title: Parish and city may combine funds
doc_html:
§508.  Parish and city may combine funds

The governing body of the parish and the city council of the city may combine their respective alms fund as a joint affair, and manage and control it in such manner and upon such conditions as the governing body of the parish, and the city council of the city, may agree upon.
doc_text:
§508.  Parish and city may combine funds
The governing body of the parish and the city council of the city may combine their respective alms fund as a joint affair, and manage and control it in such manner and upon such conditions as the governing body of the parish, and the city council of the city, may agree upon.
